microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized agent system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, production-grade infrastructure model trusted by enterprise teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation framework now adopted across multi-region HA deployments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test supporting a $1.5B+ enterprise contract — requiring deep coordination across security, networking, and infrastructure engineering teams.

Architected and deployed an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, integrating LLM-powered automation into structured planning workflows to cut cycle time by 39% and expand drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating production-grade agent engineering at cloud infrastructure scale.
microsoft_2023: Championed **enterprise adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting technical demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly — mirroring a consultative, customer-facing SA engagement model.

Shaped the **agent engineering roadmap** by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the prioritization of intent-based YAML generation as a production capability.

Improved **RAG pipeline performance** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search system, reducing information retrieval time by 83% and improving knowledge organization for developer-facing tooling.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering and operations teams — demonstrating scalable infrastructure delivery at enterprise scope.

Conducted technical discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a multi-phase roadmap to automate critical deployment paths, reducing operational overhead and enabling a more reliable, repeatable CI/CD-driven launch process.

Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** to surface automation gaps and track operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the data needed to prioritize high-impact infrastructure investments and model capacity planning decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by architecting the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional rollout across IT, Operations, and Engineering teams.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable, infrastructure-as-code-aligned release process for robotics fleet management.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain delivery velocity throughout a complex, multi-team platform migration.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved pipeline visibility and accelerated customer engagement at scale.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a data-driven, digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence and Google profile to align messaging with target customer segments.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering actionable recommendations that directly informed product and service pricing strategy.
